# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Use this section to tell people about which versions of your project are currently being supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 0.1.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 0.1   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability within Laputa-Py, please send an email to [mastwet](https://github.com/mastwet). All security vulnerabilities will be promptly addressed.

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

### When reporting a vulnerability, please include:

- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce the issue
- Possible impact of the vulnerability
- Any suggested fixes (if available)

### What to expect:

- Acknowledgment of your report within 48 hours
- A fix or mitigation plan within 7 days
- Public disclosure after the fix is released

## Security Best Practices

When using Laputa-Py:

1. Keep your dependencies up to date
2. Use virtual environments for isolation
3. Regularly audit your governance configurations
4. Follow the principle of least privilege when configuring permissions
5. Enable logging and monitoring for governance actions
